title: Vocabulary Through Context
steps: Read the full sentence before looking at options.
Identify positive or negative tone.
Eliminate options that do not fit the context.
Review the root or word family after answering.
quickTip: Do not memorize isolated meanings only; learn how the word behaves in a sentence.

title: Evidence-Based Reading
steps: Skim the passage for structure.
Underline the main claim mentally.
Match every answer with textual evidence.
Avoid options that are true but not supported by the passage.
quickTip: The best reading answer is not the most attractive option; it is the most supported option.

title: Quantitative Speed With Accuracy
steps: Revise formulas before timed practice.
Solve first without looking at options when possible.
Use options for estimation only after understanding the problem.
Keep a separate mistake notebook for repeated patterns.
quickTip: Speed grows from repeated correct method, not from random shortcuts.

title: Analytical Reasoning Diagrams
steps: Translate each rule into a short symbol.
Draw positions, groups or slots.
Mark fixed information first.
Test each option against the diagram.
quickTip: A small diagram prevents mental overload in arrangement and grouping questions.

title: Mock-Test Review Method
steps: Attempt the mock under time pressure.
Mark wrong answers by topic.
Separate careless mistakes from concept gaps.
Repeat weak topics before the next mock.
quickTip: The real value of a mock starts after submission, during review.

title: Fast Essay Outline
steps: Write a one-line thesis.
List two or three supporting ideas.
Add one example for each idea.
Write a short conclusion that returns to the thesis.
quickTip: A clear outline saves time and prevents weak, scattered writing.
